arts.ttl: Arne Slot sends classy Michael Oliver message after Premier League snub and Liverpool charge
arts.sum: Liverpool boss Arne Slot has reacted to the FA releasing the written reasons for his two-game ban after being sent off at Everton last month

arts.ttl: ‘A great fixture to look forward to for anyone who loves football’ – Arne Slot previews PSG-Liverpool
arts.sum: Liverpool head coach Arne Slot can’t wait for the Reds to go head-to-head with PSG on Wednesday for the Champions League RO16 first leg to be held at Paris’ Parc…

arts.ttl: Liverpool star a doubt to face PSG as Slot confirms injury setback
arts.sum: Liverpool attacker Cody Gakpo is a doubt to face PSG in the Uefa Champions League after Arne Slot confirmed he has suffered an injury setback. The Netherlands international has struggled with an ankle problem that has restricted him to two substitute appearances in the last four matches, totalling 39 minutes on the pitch. arts.ttl: Wataru Endo drops 'tough' hint about Liverpool future after holding talks with Arne Slot
arts.sum: Wataru Endo has been limited to a bit-part role under Arne Slot at Liverpool this season

arts.ttl: Luis Enrique Explains What Makes Liverpool ‘Perfect Team’ Before First Leg Matchup
arts.sum: Liverpool have been in top form this season, but after a weekend off, they’ll head into their Champions League first-leg matchup against Paris Saint-Germain at the Parc des Princes either well-rested or slightly rusty. arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news update: Has Arne Slot identified Premier League defender as ideal target?
arts.sum: Liverpool are enjoying success on the pitch but the Merseysiders will reportedly monitor developments regarding the availability of a Premier League defender.

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand makes bold Mohamed Salah claim ahead of Liverpool vs PSG
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah has been Liverpool's standout star on their romp towards the Premier League title and Rio Ferdinand is backing the Egypt international to win a first Ballon d'Or later this year

arts.ttl: What Luis Enrique said about Liverpool 'fighter jets' and how PSG are going to stop them

arts.ttl: Liverpool injury news: Attacker misses training ahead of Paris Saint-Germain Champions League clash
arts.sum: Liverpool are set to take on Paris Saint-Germain in the Champions League on Wednesday, but boss Arne Slot may be without one of his key stars due to injury.
